ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "dbpedia_uri" TEXT /* DBpedia URI for the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., TV show, character) */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support value for the entity mention */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the entity mention in the content */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score of the entity mention */,
  "percentage_of_second_rank" REAL /* Percentage of the second rank score */,
  "sentence_index" INTEGER /* Index of the sentence where the entity is mentioned */,
  "paragraph_index" INTEGER /* Index of the paragraph where the entity is mentioned */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the content where the entity is mentioned */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the entity */,
  "entity_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the entity */,
  "entity_popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the popularity of the entity */,
  "entity_relevance_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the relevance of the entity in the context it is mentioned */,
  "entity_first_mention_date" TEXT /* Date of the first mention of the entity in the content */,
  "entity_last_mention_date" TEXT /* Date of the last mention of the entity in the content */,
  "entity_mention_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the entity is mentioned in the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_entity_type FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type") REFERENCES entity_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical entity types) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the entity type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "content_title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of the content (e.g., TV series, movie, article) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the content (e.g., website, database) */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the content was published */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Full text of the content */,
  "content_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the content */,
  "content_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the content */,
  "content_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "content_ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the content */,
  "content_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  "content_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the content (for videos, TV shows, etc.) */,
  "content_thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("content_type") REFERENCES content_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_entities" (
  "content_entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-entity link */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity mentioned in the content */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* The exact text of the entity mention */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* The context in which the entity is mentioned (e.g., a few sentences around the mention) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_entities_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_entities_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content or entity */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content or entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the content or entity */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical content types) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the content type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
